languages.text: "Что ж, вы не померли, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Уже неплохо. Должен отдать вам должное — отваги вам не занимать, и это не комиссарская брехня".
"You're not dead, at least, my {mf|lord|lady} heir. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and that's not some Commissar claptrap."
languages.original_text: "Что ж, вы не померли, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Уже неплохо. Должен отдать вам должное — отваги вам не занимать, и это не комиссарская брехня".

traits.locale_text: "You're not dead, at least, my {mf|lord|lady} heir. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and this is not some Commissar claptrap."
"You're not dead, at least, my {mf|lord|lady} heir. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and that's not some commissar claptrap."
"You're not dead, at least, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and those are no empty Commissar words."
"You're not dead, at least, my {mf|lord|lady} heir. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and this is not some Commissar claptrap."
"You're not dead, at least, my {mf|lord|lady} heir. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and that's not some commissar claptrap."
"You're not dead, at least, my {mf|lord|lady} heir. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and that's not some Commissar claptrap."

languages.text: 「少なくとも、{mf|閣下|閣下}は死んではいない。まずはそれでいい。勇気は認めよう——これは督戦官の空疎な決まり文句じゃない」
languages.original_text: "You're not dead, at least, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and those are no empty Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: 「少なくとも、{mf|閣下|閣下}は死んではいない。まずはそれでいい。勇気は認めよう——これは督戦官の空疎な決まり文句じゃない。」

languages.text: « Au moins, vous n'êtes pas {mf|mort|morte}, {mf|héritier|héritière}. C'est un bon début. Je dois reconnaître que vous avez du cran, et ce ne sont pas des boniments de commissaire. »
languages.original_text: "You're not dead, at least, my {mf|lord|lady} heir. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and that's not some Commissar claptrap."

traits.locale_text: « Au moins, vous n'êtes pas {mf|mort|morte}, {mf|héritier|héritière}. C'est un bon début. Je dois reconnaître que vous avez du cran, et ce ne sont pas des boniments de commissaire. »

languages.text: "En azından ölmediniz {mf|lordum|leydim} vâris. Bu da bir başlangıç. Cesaretinizin hakkını vermeliyim. Bunlar Komiser zırvaları değil."
languages.original_text: "You're not dead, at least, my {mf|lord|lady} heir. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and that's not some Commissar claptrap."

traits.locale_text: "En azından ölmediniz {mf|lordum|leydim} vâris. Bu da bir başlangıç. Cesaretinizin hakkını vermeliyim. Bunlar Komiser zırvaları değil."

languages.text: «Al menos no ha muerto, {mf|lord heredero|lady heredera}. Eso es un comienzo. Tengo que reconocer su valentía, y eso no son paparruchas de comisarios».
languages.original_text: "You're not dead, at least, my {mf|lord|lady} heir. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and that's not some Commissar claptrap."

traits.locale_text: «Al menos no ha muerto, {mf|lord heredero|lady heredera}. Eso es un comienzo. Tengo que reconocer su valentía, y eso no son paparruchas de comisarios».

languages.text: “至少您还活着，继承人大人。这是个好的开始。我不得不称赞您的勇气，这可不是政委式的空话。”
languages.original_text: "You're not dead, at least, my {mf|lord|lady} heir. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and that's not some Commissar claptrap."

traits.locale_text: “至少您还活着，继承人大人。这是个好的开始。我不得不称赞您的勇气，这可不是政委式的空话。”

languages.text: "Ihr seid nicht tot. Immerhin {mf|Lord Erbe|Lady Erbin}. Das ist ein Anfang. Ich ziehe meinen Hut vor Eurem Mut und das sage ich nicht nur so dahin."
languages.original_text: "You're not dead, at least, my {mf|lord|lady} heir. That's a start. I have to give you credit for courage, and that's not some Commissar claptrap."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid nicht tot. Immerhin {mf|Lord Erbe|Lady Erbin}. Das ist ein Anfang. Ich ziehe meinen Hut vor Eurem Mut und das sage ich nicht nur so dahin."
